addons.name: DKCorrosiveAlert
addons.title: DK Corrosive Alert
addons.description:
With Update 49 Cyrodiil is full of DragonKnight, and Corrosive armor with new class is over OP, this addon notify when corosive armor is ON near you, i hope help some people

enjoy & have fun

(addon no read hide information, Corrosive armor make little bit damage, addon just read IDability of damage you receive and if is by Corrosive Armor you be warn)

addons.name: ShoyruClassicCP
addons.title: Shoyru's Classic CP
addons.description:
Update 50 replaced the Champion Point display on PvP target frames with the new Veterancy rank icon. 

When you target another player in Cyrodiil, Imperial City, or Battlegrounds, you now see their seasonal Veterancy rank instead of their CP which tells you how much they've played this season, not how strong they are.

This addon reverts that change. addons.name: ShoyruCrosshair
addons.title: Shoyru's Combat Reticle
addons.description: A clean custom crosshair plus a fully configurable hitmarker. Design your own reticle (lines, center dot, colors, outline, opacity) and get instant hit feedback: flash a hitmarker on crits only or on all damage, pick its style (adjustable cross or an X), set normal/crit colors, hold time, and a built-in sound with adjustable intensity. Everything is saved in named profiles you can switch on the fly. Type /reticle to configure.

addons.name: ShoyrUI
addons.title: Shoyru's UI
addons.description: A PvP-focused all-in-one HUD. Build a live tracker for ANY ability, buff/debuff, or gear set (uptime, stacks, procs/ICDs, delayed casts, roll-dodge warnings) with per-stack alerts, escalating colours + sounds, or minimal icons you tile into a grid-snapped tray. Plus clean movable player/target/group frames with categorised buffs & debuffs, an action-bar mover, and duration reminders (current-bar timer on the icon, other bar above). Replace the base-game HUD or run alongside it - all created in-game, no per-ability code.

addons.name: ShoyruPvPMetrics
addons.title: Shoyru's PvP Metrics
addons.description: Your personal dueling coach. Every duel is recorded and broken down — damage, healing, buffs, stats, an over-time timeline and the opponent's build — then graded on a Report Card that scores six sides of your play against your own history and tells you in plain language what won or lost the fight. Ranks you across all your rivals into an overall Dueling Tier, with a live in-duel HUD. Open World to follow.
